summary: The CI log context is marked as UNAVAILABLE, with a note that the summary reduce stage failed. Without the actual CI job output, no diagnosis of the failure can be made.

evidence.quote: UNAVAILABLE: summary reduce stage failed. See provider_error in row metadata.
evidence.reason: The provided context indicates the CI log is unavailable and the summary processing itself failed, preventing any analysis of the actual job failure.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
